texto: What am I to do on this earth? The choice rests with me: suffer or enjoy. Whither will suffering lead me? To nothingness
autor: but I shall have suffered. Whither will enjoyment lead me? To nothingness
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de but I shall have suffered. Whither will enjoyment lead me? To nothingness que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What am I to do on this earth? The choice rests with me: suffer or enjoy. Whither will suffering …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, but-i-shall-have-enjoyed-myself, earth, com foco em reflexao.
